active_policies.generative_ai_use: Level 2: AI as Co-Pilot. Students must cite specific prompts used and attach an appendix showing how they verified the AI's output against textbook claims.
active_policies.academic_integrity: Violations involve submitting raw AI output without structural modification or critique.

local_context_variables.current_campus_challenge: Parking shortage in Lot C leading to delayed attendance.
local_context_variables.student_demographics: 40% first-generation, high percentage of working adult learners.
